---
title: {studyTitle}
subtitle: Evidence Generation Plan 
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    fontsize: 14pt
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: Contents
    theme: cosmo
    grid:
      body-width: 2200px
      sidebar-width: 200px
      margin-width: 200px
      gutter-width: 50px
---

# Background {{#sec-background}}

## Rationale {{#sec-rationale}}

**EXAMPLES PLEASE MODIFY**

The purpose of this study is to characterize patients with disease x for an internal analysis.

## Research Questions {{#sec-questions}}

**EXAMPLES PLEASE MODIFY**

- How many people can we identify with cohort 1?
- How do we characterize patients in cohort 1 at baseline (-365 days to -1 day before the index date)?

## Data Sources {{#sec-data}}


# Cohort Definitions {{#sec-cohorts}}


# Analysis {{#sec-analysis}}
